worker.generalist: Search all eight registered mechanisms and prefer the simplest full-prefix explanation.
worker.differences: Pay special attention to finite differences, periodic differences, and lagged polynomial increments.
worker.recurrences: Pay special attention to affine and second-order recurrences, including periodic phases.
worker.streams: Pay special attention to interleaved streams, lagged subsequences, and growing blocks.
worker.modular: Actively test modular affine structure and real wrap points, while rejecting forced modular stories.
worker.simplicity: Prefer the shortest allowed complete mechanism and reject clever partial fits.
worker.diversifier: Actively seek a materially different allowed mechanism from the current leading explanation.
worker.audit: Prioritize exact replay of the visible prefix and reliable arithmetic before extrapolation.

proposer.generalist: Search all eight registered mechanisms. Prefer the simplest rule that fits every visible term, then verify all five continuations.
proposer.differences: Prioritize finite differences, periodic differences, and lagged polynomial increments. Still switch mechanisms if the full prefix disproves them.
proposer.recurrences: Prioritize affine and second-order recurrences, including periodic coefficients or biases. Check every transition exactly.
proposer.streams: Prioritize interleaved streams, lagged subsequences, and growing blocks. Separate phases before extrapolating.
proposer.modular: Actively test modular affine structure and wrap points, while rejecting modular stories that do not fit every transition.
proposer.simplicity: Look for the shortest allowed mechanism that explains the whole prefix. Treat a clever partial fit as a failure.
proposer.diversifier: Seek a materially different allowed mechanism from the obvious first guess, then compare full-prefix fit and extrapolation.
proposer.audit: Reconstruct the rule and independently replay the visible prefix before calculating the next five terms. Arithmetic reliability is the priority.

critic.falsify: Try to break each candidate against the full prefix. Reject any arithmetic error, unsupported phase, or overfit before choosing or repairing an answer.
critic.alternate: Search for an allowed mechanism the proposal pool may have missed. Prefer a new answer only when it fits the full prefix more convincingly.
critic.arithmetic: Audit the leading candidates transition by transition and recompute their five predicted terms. Focus on silent arithmetic mistakes.
critic.consensus_skeptic: Treat popularity as weak evidence. Find whether a minority candidate has a stronger exact mechanism, but do not change answers merely to be different.

revision.repair: Select the strongest proposal for each case, identify its weakest step, and repair it only when a complete allowed mechanism supports the change.
revision.reframe: Re-solve disputed cases from a different representation such as phases, differences, or subsequences. Preserve strong proposals when reframing adds no evidence.
revision.pairwise: Compare the two strongest distinct answers directly. Decide which mechanism reproduces every visible term, then return the repaired winner.

verifier.prefix_replay: Independently replay each candidate mechanism across the complete visible prefix and recommend the answer with the strongest exact fit.
verifier.forward_check: Recompute the continuation from the inferred mechanism. Prefer stable derivations and penalize unsupported jumps or fragile pattern matching.
verifier.minority_check: Examine the best minority answer as seriously as the plurality answer, then select only on full-prefix mathematical support.
verifier.robustness: Choose the answer that survives arithmetic checking and plausible alternative mechanisms. Do not reward confidence by itself.

judge.plurality_preserving: Use proposal plurality as the default. Override it only when later evidence identifies a concrete full-prefix or arithmetic failure and supports a complete alternative.
judge.evidence_weighted: Select the answer backed by the clearest complete mechanism and independent checks. Popularity and confidence are secondary evidence.
judge.minority_aware: Compare the plurality with the strongest coherent minority. Change the plurality only when the minority has decisively better full-prefix support.
judge.robustness_first: Choose the answer that survives the most independent falsification and verification. Avoid novel alternatives that were not fully reconstructed.
